---
title: "index.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/cachebro/packages/sdk/src/index.ts"
loc: 15
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.40
style_score: 9.39
intel_score: 4.67
overall_score: 6.26
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [CacheStore](file://./cache.js)
- [FileWatcher](file://./watcher.js)
- [CacheConfig](file://./types.js)

### Exports
- `CacheStore`
- `FileWatcher`
- `computeDiff`
- `CacheConfig`
- `createCache`
- `createCache`
- `cache`
- `watcher`
